first_run.rationale: The score is identical (4/10), and the reasoning is substantively the same in both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the candidate as a long-tenured software engineer but note a lack of specific director-level scope, strategic AI experience, and customer advisory skills. The minor differences in wording are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the candidate's work locations.
